home.heroDesc: Permissionless. AI-vetted. Multi-chain. With native fiat rails, Z-BANCK integration, and refundable sales. Every feature the competition lacks — and then some.
home.featuresDesc: We built Z-PAD to solve every pain point of PinkSale, DAO Maker, Seedify, and every other launchpad combined.
home.howDesc: From zero to invested in under 3 minutes.
home.ctaDesc: Join 54,000+ investors already backing the next generation of Web3 projects through the most advanced launchpad ever built.
home.feature1Desc: Every project gets an AI Score 0-100 analyzing tokenomics, smart contracts, team history, and market fit. No other launchpad has this.
home.feature2Desc: Buy tokens directly with credit card, PIX, or wire transfer via Z-PAY. Zero other launchpads offer this.
home.feature3Desc: Full refund within 48h of TGE if KPIs not met. Protects investors — pioneered by DAO Maker, now default here.
home.feature4Desc: Your on-chain reputation replaces staking requirements. No more locking $50k in platform tokens to access good projects.
home.feature5Desc: Fair Launch, Presale, Private, LBP, Bonding Curve — we support everything. Competitors support 1-2.
home.feature6Desc: Native Z-BANCK fintech integration: invest with fiat balance, receive profits in USD/BRL, use positions as collateral.
home.how1Desc: Link MetaMask, Obelisk-Z, or pay with fiat — no wallet required.
home.how2Desc: Verify once. Unlocks private rounds across the entire ZETTA ecosystem.
home.how3Desc: Browse AI-vetted projects. Participate with crypto or fiat.
home.how4Desc: Claim at TGE, track vesting, stake for extra rewards.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1: By accessing or using the Z-PAD platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the platform.
terms.s2: You must be at least 18 years old and comply with all applicable laws in your jurisdiction to use Z-PAD. The platform is not available in jurisdictions where participation in token sales or DeFi activities is prohibited.
terms.s3: Participating in token launches involves significant financial risk. You may lose all funds invested. Past performance is not indicative of future results. ZION AI scores are informational tools and do not constitute financial advice.
terms.s4: Project creators must complete KYC verification through our institutional-grade verification partner. Failure to maintain valid KYC may result in suspension of services.
terms.s6: Z-PAD and the ZETTA ecosystem are provided on an "as is" basis. We disclaim all warranties and shall not be liable for any losses arising from smart contract exploits, market volatility, or third-party actions.
terms.s7: For legal inquiries, contact legal@zettaword.com. For platform support, use the ZION AI assistant or visit our documentation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1: We collect wallet addresses, on-chain transaction data, KYC verification data (processed by Veriff), and usage analytics. We do not collect unnecessary personal data.
privacy.s2: Your data is used to provide platform services, comply with legal requirements (including AML/KYC obligations), improve the ZION AI scoring engine, and send important service notifications.
privacy.s3: We do not sell your personal data. We share data with KYC providers (Veriff), blockchain infrastructure partners, and law enforcement when legally required. All on-chain data is publicly visible by nature.
privacy.s4: KYC data is retained for 5 years to comply with financial regulations. Transaction logs are stored for 3 years. You may request deletion of non-regulatory data by contacting us.
privacy.s5: We use minimal, privacy-preserving analytics (no third-party tracking). Session cookies are used for authentication only. You may disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s6: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, rectify, or erase your personal data. Submit requests to privacy@zettaword.com. We respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7: Data Controller: ZETTA WORD. Contact: privacy@zettaword.com.

footer.tagline: The most advanced crypto launchpad. AI-vetted. Multi-chain. Institutional grade.
footer.vasp: Z-PAD operates as a VASP under applicable regulations.
